51:
(-Erart's Letter-)Dear mother,
<Emphasis>If you're reading this letter, then I'm very sorry, but I won't be returning home. Please don't be mad, and don't be sad. Just know that I did what I had to for the sake of Ala Mhigo.</Emphasis>

66:
It says these are date palm seeds from Garlemald, and they'll grow even in soil as barren as ours.
“May the fruit of these trees bring you health and happiness always.”
